title: 🚨 OFFICIAL BG ANNOUNCEMENT | Important Message From Professor Stephen Beard This Week
description:
In this video, I am sharing the latest official announcement released by BG Group Management concerning this week's important updates.

Professor Stephen Beard has provided a newly recorded explanation for all BG members, including the temporary suspension of this week's Zoom meetings and guidance on where all trusted official information should be received.

Every BG member is advised to stay informed and only follow announcements released through BonChat official channels.

Watch this video carefully till the end and make sure you share it with your entire team so nobody misses this important update.

Thank you for watching and staying connected with BG official information. #BGWealthSharing
